flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Eau Claire rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.1k → $19.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Eau Claire fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
